query:
INSERT INTO `products` (`name`, `price`, `description`, `features`, `tier`, `createdAt`) VALUES
('7-Night Protocol', 500, 'The complete 7-night sleep reset protocol with daily guidance', '[\"7-night step-by-step protocol\",\"Daily email reminders\",\"Sleep tracking worksheet\",\"CBT-I techniques\"]', 'basic', NOW()),
('Personalized Sleep Plan', 1900, 'AI-generated personalized sleep plan based on your chronotype', '[\"Personalized 7-night protocol\",\"Sleep tracking dashboard\",\"Chronotype analysis\",\"Daily AI coaching emails\",\"30-day support\"]', 'pro', NOW()),
('Advanced Sleep Mastery', 4900, 'Complete sleep transformation with lifetime access and community', '[\"Everything in Pro\",\"Lifetime protocol updates\",\"Private community access\",\"Monthly group coaching calls\",\"Advanced sleep optimization\",\"Priority email support\"]', 'premium', NOW());
